action.content: Expression: The grid has a filled plus shape with arms of width one cell, except the left arm extends fully from top to bottom, and the rightmost column has four filled cells (rows 1, 3, and 5 fully filled, row 4 only the fourth cell filled, row 2 empty).
action.label: response
